nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: Beesley's lark
nodes.summary: Beesley's lark（Beesley's lark，学名 Chersomanes beesleyi），已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 坦桑尼亚
nodes.summary: 坦桑尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联307种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Shelley's francolin等307种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Constantine Walter Benson
nodes.summary: Constantine Walter Benson是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Beesley's lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Beesley's Lark (Chersomanes beesleyi) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae. It was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the Spike-heeled Lark. The Beesley's Lark is found in Northern Tanzania, in some very restricted patches of Afrotropical grassland, mainly composed of Sporobolus ioclados and Digitaria macroblephara on volcanic soil.{{Cite journal |last=Beesley, John S

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Beesley's Lark (Chersomanes beesleyi) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae. It was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the Spike-heeled Lark. The Beesley's Lark is found in Northern Tanzania, in some very restricted patches of Afrotropical grassland, mainly composed of Sporobolus ioclados and Digitaria macroblephara on volcanic soil.{{Cite journal |last=Beesley, John S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Beesley’s Lark population is small, and highly threatened. However, as of October 2024, renewed surveys were performed in Northern Tanzania, which may have found some minor colonies outside of the main core area for the species, whose estimated population is nevertheless of fewer than 70 individuals left, in total. In its main site, namely some pastoralized, semi-desertified land 45km north of Arusha, the species is critically threatened by overgrazing and climate change; egg and nestling survival is very low, mainly due to intense cattle trampling. Some Maasai villagers, living in the nearby communities, have long tried to conserve this species, and are constantly achieving small successes, at least temporarily saving it from extinction
